evals.prompt: Hire a CTO agent. They should use Claude Code, report to the CEO, and work on the main Paperclip repo.
evals.expected_output: Follows the full hiring workflow: confirms identity, reads adapter config docs, compares existing agents, picks an icon, drafts a hire payload, and submits via POST /api/companies/{companyId}/agent-hires.

assertions.text: Submits POST to /api/companies/{companyId}/agent-hires with correct payload shape
Payload includes name, role, adapterType, adapterConfig with cwd, reportsTo, and icon

evals.prompt: We need to staff up the engineering team. Add a new backend developer agent that uses Codex and reports to the CTO.
evals.expected_output: Creates a hire request for a backend developer using codex_local adapter, with proper reporting chain and adapter config matching the environment.

assertions.text: Sets reportsTo to the CTO agent ID
